summary: Iteration 13: Frontend testing for MiniCalendar availability features and Agenda hours. All 7 features PASSED. Booking calendar shows color-coded availability (red=booked, green=free, grey=past). Agenda displays reservation hours in HH:MM format with clock icon. Book button on free dates navigates to vehicles page.

test_1_booking_calendar_availability.details: MiniCalendar shows legend with Occupé (red dot), Libre (green dot), Passé (grey dot). Booked dates (Feb 25-28, Oct 15-18) display with pink/red background and small red bar at bottom.

test_2_calendar_month_navigation.details: Successfully navigated from February to October 2026. October calendar shows days 15-18 with pink/red background (booked) and other future dates with green background (free).

test_3_cannot_select_booked_date.details: Clicked on booked date (Oct 15) - calendar modal remained open, confirming booked dates cannot be selected.

test_4_agenda_hours_display.details: In reservations calendar view, clicking on Oct 15 shows event card with clock icon and '08:00 - 18:00' time format. Full display: 'Volkswagen Golf', 'Espèces en attente', '15 oct. - 18 oct. 2026', '3 jours', 'CHF 195.00'.

test_5_agenda_book_button.details: Clicking on free date (Oct 20) in calendar view shows 'Aucune réservation' message and purple 'Réserver un véhicule' button with + icon.

test_6_agenda_book_navigation.details: Clicking 'Réserver un véhicule' button navigated to /vehicles page showing 'Notre Flotte' with '11 véhicules disponibles'.

test_7_french_accents.details: All French text displays correctly: 'Occupé', 'Libre', 'Passé', 'réservation', 'Réserver un véhicule', 'Aujourd'hui', 'Espèces en attente', 'véhicules disponibles'.

seed_data_used.reservation: Oct 15-18, 2026 for Volkswagen Golf, status: pending_cash

context_for_next_testing_agent: MiniCalendar availability feature fully working: 1) vehicleId prop triggers availability API call, 2) Booked dates show pink/red background with red bar, 3) Free dates show green background, 4) Past dates disabled with grey styling, 5) Legend displays at top of calendar. Agenda calendar view shows hours in HH:MM - HH:MM format with clock icon, and 'Réserver un véhicule' button on free dates navigates to /vehicles.
